spec.name: Inside The West Gate Of New Thalos
spec.description: Two large stone towers embedded in the wall loom over you. The massive iron gate, emblazoned with the crest of New Thalos, swings easily on four ornately crafted hinges. It is obvious the makers of this city spared no expense in protecting their home. Main street heads towards the market eastward and the wilderness beckons from the west. To the south lies the entrance the Warriors' Guild.
